predicates.name: is_small_company_with_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company is a small company with legal personality.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company is a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company is a parent company.

predicates.name: micro_employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual average employees > 10).

predicates.name: micro_turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual net turnover excl. VAT > 900000 EUR).

predicates.name: micro_balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The micro-company balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (balance sheet total > 450000 EUR).

predicates.name: more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one micro-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_micro_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one micro-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the last closed financial year for the company on the balance sheet date.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a micro-company under the statutory definition.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding value added tax of the company in the financial year, in EUR.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in EUR.
